word.definition: To expedite something is to cause it to happen faster.

sports_fact.text: The 1869 Cincinnati Red Stockings were baseball's first openly professional team. They went undefeated on a national tour, winning around 60 straight games.

market.headline: Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Clinches Longest Weekly Winning Streak Since 2023
market.summary: Index rises for eighth straight week; Warsh sworn in as Fed chair

quote.text: There are addictions to feed and there are mouths to pay So you bargain with the Devil but you're okay for today.
quote.author: Jewel (singer)

history.text: World War II: Heinrich Himmler, head of the Schutzstaffel, commits suicide while in Allied custody.
